question: What is the full list of hook events a charm can observe? List them all.

claude_output.result:
Here is the full list of observable hook events:

## Lifecycle

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `install` | Unit first deployed |
| `start` | Unit starts for the first time |
| `config_changed` | Configuration changed, or on startup/network change |
| `update_status` | Periodic health check (default every 5 minutes) |
| `upgrade_charm` | Charm code is being upgraded |
| `stop` | Unit is shutting down |
| `remove` | Unit is being terminated |
| `pre_series_upgrade` | Before OS series upgrade *(removed in Juju 4.0)* |
| `post_series_upgrade` | After OS series upgrade *(removed in Juju 4.0)* |

## Leadership

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `leader_elected` | This unit has become the leader |
| `leader_settings_changed` | Leader changed its settings *(deprecated since 2.4)* |

## Status Collection

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `collect_unit_status` | End of every hook — set unit status |
| `collect_app_status` | End of every hook (leader only) — set app status |

## Secrets (Juju 3.0+)

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `secret_changed` | Observer: secret owner updated the secret content |
| `secret_expired` | Owner: secret expiry time has elapsed |
| `secret_rotate` | Owner: secret rotation policy elapsed |
| `secret_remove` | Owner: a secret revision can be safely removed |

## Relations (one set per named relation endpoint)

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `<rel>_relation_created` | A new relation has been established |
| `<rel>_relation_joined` | A remote unit has joined the relation |
| `<rel>_relation_changed` | A remote unit changed its relation data |
| `<rel>_relation_departed` | A remote unit has left the relation |
| `<rel>_relation_broken` | The relation is being removed |

## Storage (one set per named storage)

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `<storage>_storage_attached` | Storage is ready (fires before `install`) |
| `<storage>_storage_detaching` | Storage is being removed (fires before `stop`) |

## Pebble / Containers (Kubernetes only, one set per named container)

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `<container>_pebble_ready` | Pebble API is up and ready |
| `<container>_pebble_check_failed` | Health check reached failure threshold |
| `<container>_pebble_check_recovered` | Previously failing health check is now passing |
| `<container>_pebble_custom_notice` | A Pebble custom notice was created or repeated |

## Actions (one per action defined in `charmcraft.yaml`)

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `<action>_action` | An administrator invoked the named action |

## Deprecated

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `collect_metrics` | Metrics collection, every 5 minutes *(removed in Juju 3.6.11)* |

---

Dynamic events (relations, storage, containers, actions) are accessed via `self.on["<name>"].<event>` or the shorthand `self.on.<name>_<event>`.
